name: SubDownload
description: Fetch YouTube transcripts, search videos, browse channels and playlists — instant YouTube data for your AI workflow.

tools.name: fetch_transcript
tools.description: Fetch YouTube video transcript/captions in any language

tools.name: search_youtube
tools.description: Search YouTube for videos or channels

tools.name: resolve_channel
tools.description: Resolve @handle, URL, or video link to channel info

tools.name: search_channel_videos
tools.description: Search videos within a specific channel

tools.name: get_channel_latest_videos
tools.description: Get latest videos from a channel
